title: MeasuredImprovementPayload
description: A proposed improvement AFTER the Evaluator has shadow-tested it on held-out experience. ONLY the Evaluator emits this, and ONLY to the Monitor. The required measurement fields are what make I13 structural: an unmeasured proposal cannot be expressed on this edge, so nothing reaches safety review without evidence.

target_failure.description: The recurring, evidenced failure this addresses.

hypothesis.description: The falsifiable claim the Evaluator tested: applying `delta` reduces `target_failure` without regressions.

kind.description: A heuristic (lesson) or a reusable task strategy (playbook). NEVER a capability or constraint change (I14).

delta.description: The proposed addition. Append-only in intent.

measured_benefit.description: Evaluator-measured failure-rate reduction on the held-out set. Must clear limits.improvement.min_measured_benefit to be forwarded.

regressions.description: New failures introduced on the control set. Must be empty (zero regressions) for the Evaluator to forward this; a non-empty list means the proposal is rejected instead.

evaluation_evidence.description: The Evaluator's reproducible measurement record (held-out and control set results).
